message:
fix(codegen): Filter lazy class attribute patterns from var declarations

When a class has lazy-initialized attributes (e.g., MIN = fromHex(...)),
var_renames contains patterns like "(try MIN(__alloc))" for lazy access.
This was incorrectly being used for variable DECLARATIONS like:
  MIN = self.MIN  ->  const (try MIN(__alloc)) = self.MIN  // WRONG

Now filter out patterns starting with "(try " in getVarDeclName() so
declarations use the original name:
  MIN = self.MIN  ->  const MIN = self.MIN  // CORRECT

The lazy access pattern is only for READS (expressions), not for
declaring new local variables.

Added getVarDeclName() helper in core.zig and used it in
value_generation.zig for consistent handling.
